name: Smita V. Crishna
profileSummary: Smita V. Crishna is an Indian stock trader who is one of the Richest women in India. Crishna has the net worth of $2.5 Billion. She, along with her other family members, the complete Godrej family controls the $5.7 billion (revenue) Godrej Group, a 127-year-old consumer-goods giant.
